app.name: Flow
app.description: Offline-first personal expense tracker for Indian users

design_philosophy.rationale: Financial tracking should feel natural, not stressful. The warm cream background reduces clinical harshness, while the indigo accent provides focus. Focus is placed on Indian UI paradigms (₹, comma formatting).

cards.light_style: background: surface, shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.03), border: none
cards.dark_style: background: surface, shadow: none, border: 1px solid border

charts.bar_chart: Rounded top corners for bars (radius 4px). Use Primary for main, soft Indigo for secondary.
charts.donut_chart: Use semantic palette (Primary, wallet_load, success, expense) mixed with varying opacities of Primary for different categories. 24px stroke width.

icons.rules: Stroke width 2px. Size 24px for primary actions, 20px for inline.

layout_flow: Header: Greeting + Profile icon or Settings gear (data-testid='settings-btn')
Hero Card: Total Spent this month (Large typography, primary background gradient, white text) (data-testid='total-spent-card')
Quick Stats: Horizontal scroll or 2-col grid (Daily Average, Top Category)
Bar Chart: Top 3 categories overview
Split View: SMS vs Manual entry percentage (visual bar)
Recent Transactions: Short list (top 3) with 'View All' link
Header: 'Add Expense'
Input Area: Massive text field for Natural Language ('120 chai and samosa'). (data-testid='nl-input')
Voice Input: Floating action button near the input (data-testid='voice-input-btn')
Predictions: Predicted category chip (tappable to change). (data-testid='category-chip')
Payment Method: Horizontal scroll of chips (Cash, Bank, UPI Lite, Paytm Wallet). (data-testid='payment-method-scroll')
Optional: 'Why' note standard input.
Footer: Sticky 'Save' button. (data-testid='save-expense-btn')
Header: 'Wallets & UPI Lite'
List of Loads: Cards showing 'Load Amount' vs 'Spent'.
Card Details: Progress bar (Allocated vs Remaining).
Nested Items: Tapping a card expands to show linked expenses.
Tabs: Monthly | Yearly | Custom (Sticky top) (data-testid='report-tabs')
Visual: Donut chart for category breakdown (amount & %).
Data: Transaction list grouped by date.
Action: 'Export to CSV' button fixed at bottom or top right. (data-testid='export-csv-btn')
Header: 'Pending SMS Logs'
List: Cards of parsed SMS (Amount, Merchant, Date).
Actions: Each card has 'Confirm' (Primary) and 'Edit' (Secondary) buttons. (data-testid='confirm-sms-btn')
Header: 'Settings'
Toggles: Dark Mode toggle. (data-testid='dark-mode-toggle')
Data: Export/Import local data (offline-first focus).

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case. Buttons, links, form inputs, menus, error messages, user balances, and confirmation text.
